sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80960" key="pera/ghn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περάγην</orth>, <sense id="n80960.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">διέρρωγα</ref></xr>, dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1654.tlg001:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhinth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
